code: export class GangInviteParser{constructor(){this._inviterUsername='';this._gangName='';}flush(){this._inviterUsername='';this._gangName='';return true;}parse(wrapper){this._inviterUsername=wrapper.readString();this._gangName=wrapper.readString();console.log("Parse data recieved!!");return true;}get inviterUsername(){return this._inviterUsername;}get gangName(){return this._gangName;}}
